title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Unknown person #10, Toki, Orochi Forces, Oden as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is different from other nights!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are being punished for not believing in them! This will be the start of a 'forever night'-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dark Times where the Sun will no longer rise!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hope that after 20 years of endless moonlit nights,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: nine Shadows will bring a blinding sunrise!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: I told you to boil the water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not hot! You want me to go into room temperature water?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's hot! The water is very hot,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Be careful or you will burn!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stop shaking, bring the bones of the Kozuki Samurai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I need proof that they are dead!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
